message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.duplicated (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.duplicated() —
returns a boolean Series marking each row as a duplicate of an
earlier row (keep=First default):

- duplicated_basic_first: 5-row 2-col frame, rows 2 and 4 are
  duplicates of rows 0 and 1 respectively
- duplicated_no_dups: 3-row frame with all-distinct rows, returns
  all-False

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.duplicated(subset=None, keep="first")), runs the Rust
DataFrame.duplicated(None, DuplicateKeep::First), and asserts
parity via compare_series_expected. DataFrameDuplicated was already
wired through the Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-c0c8a]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
